parameters.name: X-Gusto-API-Version
parameters.description: Determines the date-based API version associated with your API call. If none is provided, your application's [minimum API version](https://docs.gusto.com/embedded-payroll/docs/api-versioning#minimum-api-version) is used.

parameters.name: location_uuid
parameters.description: Filter employees by a specific primary work location

parameters.name: payroll_uuid
parameters.description: Filter employees by a specific payroll

parameters.name: search_term
parameters.description: A string to search for in the object's names

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort employees by field. Cannot be used with search_term. Options: created_at, name, onboarding_status

parameters.name: include

x-enumDescriptions.all_compensations: Include all effective dated compensations for each job instead of only the current compensation. Requires `compensations:read` scope.
x-enumDescriptions.all_home_addresses: Include all home addresses that have been associated to this employee
x-enumDescriptions.company_name: Include the name of the company that the employee is associated with
x-enumDescriptions.current_home_address: Include the employee's current home address
x-enumDescriptions.portal_invitations: Include portal invitation status information, including member portal invitation details and partner portal invitation status

parameters.description: Include the requested attribute(s) in each employee response. Multiple options are comma separated.

parameters.name: onboarded
parameters.description: Filters employees by those who have completed onboarding

parameters.name: onboarded_active
parameters.description: Filters employees who are ready to work (onboarded AND active today)

parameters.name: terminated
parameters.description: Filters employees by those who have been or are scheduled to be terminated

parameters.name: terminated_today
parameters.description: Filters employees by those who have been terminated and whose termination is in effect today (excludes active and scheduled to be terminated)

parameters.name: uuids
parameters.description: Optional subset of employees to fetch.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page that is requested. When unspecified, will load all objects unless endpoint forces pagination.

parameters.name: per
parameters.description: Number of objects per page. For majority of endpoints will default to 25
